channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Parking is also bad at this spot., 26th May
item.description:
Yellow lines please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 1, Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Date required for when lines are being painted., 26th May
item.description:
When are the parking restrictions being put in place?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 1, Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fencing blocking PROW, 26th May
item.description:
Since the completion of the cycle/pedestrian path, the sign for the PROW across the racecourse is blocked by new fencing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement narrowed right down to a matter of inches to walk on by a busy road, 26th May
item.description:
Hi, From Stollards Close right up to the Texaco Garage by the Gotherington Turn the pavement in some places has narrowed down to a couple of inches due to silt and road mud building up as per the photos (Which only show a small section) the A435 is a really busy road and very fast and now you are forced walking along it (As many do everyday) to be right out by the road so the chances of being clipped and hit by a car/lorry are getting more and more all the time, At night it is impossible to walk on the raised silt as its so uneven. Also passing other walkers you actually have to step into the road sometimes. The pavement up that stretch needs clearing back and uncovering as its seriously unsafe and only getting worse. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 26th May
item.description:
Sweep loose stone from FW 12mtrs Give and take TM Outside Greyhound pub (FW Over-Riding)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor parking increasing accident risk, 26th May
item.description:
We now have large vans parking on the pavement on the bend of a t junction. These are residents that have allocated parking to the rear of their property, but park illegally out the front because there is no reason not to

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 15ft before The Pitch - as marked, 26th May
item.description:
Long deep pothole that is damaging vehicles. About 100mm deep and 3 ft long
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Mill Lane, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 26th May
item.description:
Cw pothole 2000x400x45mm Give and take (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 26th May
item.description:
15DB CW: Edge deteration 1500mmx400mmx74mm TM: temporary road closure ENWD Outside No 11 (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on footpath to Burrows Field from Church Road, Leckhampton., 26th May
item.description:
The pothole is near property 107 Church Road, Leckhampton. It has been here for weeks. The 1st two photos were taken on 20th May when we had lots of rain. The last photo was taken today, 26th May, when we have had a heatwave yet there is still mud and water in the hole.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88, Church Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown with weeds and stinging nettles towards rear of 5 Canning Road, 26th May
item.description:
Email of 26/5/26 0914 hours - Can you please cut the area of land at the back of 5 Canning Road Longlevens Glos GL2 0XX This is an on-going problem, can you please add it to your schedule of work.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking, 26th May
item.description:
Could definitely do with some parking restrictions along this stretch of road. It's a bit of a nightmare! (Second photo for attention, dog not included)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 1, Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
